name: Mandarin Chicken and Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts diagonally into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Arrange in a circular pattern in a 9-inch round baking dish; sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cut frozen broccoli into 2-inch lengths; arrange over chicken. Cover with plastic wrap and microwave on high for 6 minutes.
3. Move chicken and broccoli and microwave on high for 3 to 5 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink. Drain 1/4 cup liquid from cooked chicken and broccoli into a 4-cup glass measure; set chicken and broccoli aside.
4. Combine cornstarch, orange juice, marjoram, and ginger. Add to reserved liquid. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 3 minutes or until mixture thickens. Add oranges and microwave on high for 1 minute.
5. Arrange chicken, broccoli, and rice on a serving platter; spoon sauce over top.
